status.description:
Lifecycle state for the inline async action indicator. Bindable: the
component resets this to `"inactive"` after the `successDelay` timer fires
so a subsequent `status = "finished"` from the parent is always a real
value transition that re-shows the success indicator.

description.description: Visible status label rendered next to the indicator.

iconDescription.description: Accessible status wording used by announcements when no visible description is provided.

successDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before auto-resetting `finished` back to `inactive`.

class.description: Extra classes appended to the root element.
